title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Microtek International - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Microtek International - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Process Engineer looking for your next big career move? Microtek International in Jaipur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Microtek International:
Microtek International is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Microtek International!
